sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 71

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 71:1
items.html:
(to the question) First MANTZEPACH
See Answer 1. There are two kinds of MANTZEPACH in the Nukva: the first, from the time of her Katnut, being discernments of Gevurot and Dinim, on account of the lower Hey in their Eynaim, which causes the lack of GAR. And there is MANTZEPACH from the time of the Nukva's Gadlut — that is, when the lower Hey has already descended from her Eynaim; and these MANTZEPACH are sweetened Gevurot, and they are more important than the Hassadim. The first MANTZEPACH the Nukva receives from ZA; and the second MANTZEPACH she receives from Ima. (Items 73 and 95)
